---
title: "Digital Pathology and Healthcare Integrations"
description: "Building secure AWS integrations for exchanging patient data, pathology images, and diagnostic reports across healthcare systems."
image: ../images/aws_logo.png
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show Code"
---

![EMR LIS integration diagram](../images/EMRLISIntegration.svg)

*Work in Progress.*
